summary: Hydrated state keeps #62514 as the live canonical issue for the mixed image/native vision gap. The linked PR #63710 is security-sensitive because its remote-media fetch path has SSRF-policy/security-boundary review findings, so it is routed to central security handling only. No close, merge, or fix PR action is planned because the only non-security candidate is the canonical open issue and the job blocks fix/merge work.

actions.reason: #62514 is the best live canonical issue and should remain open for the mixed-image behavior/product decision.

The PR touches remote media fetching and has unresolved security-boundary/SSRF-policy review findings, so it must be handled by central OpenClaw security triage rather than cluster cleanup automation.
